title: How to Actually Work With Us on Healthcare AI Research
author: John Wu
preview: A practical guide to joining the PyHealth Research Initiative: join Discord, pick a bounty, and earn trust by shipping a solid PR.

title: Faster, Cleaner Healthcare Data Preprocessing with PyHealth
author: John Wu
preview: pyhealth.tasks separates static data loading from dynamic transformation logic, so you can iterate on preprocessing pipelines quickly without re-loading gigabytes of data every time.
